arts.ttl: Chelsea fans have a lot to say about Jadon Sancho after performance vs Brighton, they’re angry about the same thing
arts.sum: Chelsea put in one of their poorest displays of the season on Friday night during a crushing 3-0 defeat away to Brighton. Chelsea were beaten...

arts.ttl: 'Battered!' Carragher rips apart Chelsea display at Brighton
arts.sum: Chelsea were "battered" by Brighton during their 3-0 loss to Brighton on Friday Night Football at the Amex, says Sky Sports' Jamie Carragher, as he laid bare a long list of problems for Blues boss Enzo Maresca.

arts.ttl: Brighton 3-0 Chelsea: Match report & 4 talking points from Blues capitulation

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher brands stunning Kaoru Mitoma first touch 'Messi-like' as fans go wild over winger's skill before scoring Brighton's opener against Chelsea
arts.sum: Brighton's Kaoru Mitoma was placed in the same bracket as Lionel Messi and Dennis Bergkamp after producing an exquisite touch before firing in one of the great Premier League goals.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans make feelings clear with their actions as side embarrassed by Brighton
arts.sum: BRIGHTON 3-0 CHELSEA: The away side didn't manage a single shot on target and badly missed striker Nicolas Jackson as they were easily beaten by the south coast Seagulls, with Japan star Mitoma scoring a magnificent virtuoso goal

arts.ttl: Yankuba Minteh scores twice as Chelsea suffer deja-vu defeat at Brighton
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca’s Blues were ripped apart as their pursuit of Champions League qualification was damaged by a repeat result.

arts.ttl: 'Fair play': Jason Cundy gives credit to one Chelsea player despite really poor 3-0 defeat to Brighton

arts.sum: Chelsea were a shambles in defence and offered nothing in attack
